title: Phantasy Star Portable 2
wikitext:
[]: Phantasy Star Portable 2             Quote Post by Lonecow12 » Fri Sep 24, 2010 10:47 am Were you all aware that Phantasy Star Portable 2 lets you use Shinji, Rei's, and Asuka's plugsuit as well as has the Lance of Longinus as a weapon, even in the US version. I got it yesterday and if you are an old school PSO fan I bet you will like it as much as me. Plus you can make pretty faithful recreations of the Eva characters and have them in your party to take on baddies. Pretty awesome. Also will have Fate/Stay Night characters to use in January.

[]:             Quote Post by SpearofLonginus » Fri Sep 24, 2010 11:41 am I'd be an idiot not to be aware of this XD Were the plugsuits confirmed? Last I checked just the Lance was. If so, sweet ^^

[]:             Quote Post by Lonecow12 » Fri Sep 24, 2010 1:08 pm Yep I have them all unlocked in the game now. Right now the only thing Japan has and we don't is Asuka's Test plug suit.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Sep 24, 2010 6:17 pm Looks awesome! Also...

[]: Re: Phantasy Star Portable 2             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sat Sep 25, 2010 1:41 pm Lonecow12 wrote: Also will have Fate/Stay Night characters to use in January.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Sep 26, 2010 1:56 am ^ Elaborate. You lost me there.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Sep 26, 2010 10:16 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: Elaborate. You lost me there.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sun Sep 26, 2010 12:13 pm It doesn't strike anyone as odd that The Colonel is in this game? He throws flaming balls of chicken.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sun Sep 26, 2010 3:28 pm BrikHaus wrote: Don't analyze Bastard King's comments too much. He's still learning English.

[]: Phantasy Star Portable 2             Quote Post by Lonecow12 » Fri Sep 24, 2010 10:47 am Were you all aware that Phantasy Star Portable 2 lets you use Shinji, Rei's, and Asuka's plugsuit as well as has the Lance of Longinus as a weapon, even in the US version. I got it yesterday and if you are an old school PSO fan I bet you will like it as much as me. Plus you can make pretty faithful recreations of the Eva characters and have them in your party to take on baddies. Pretty awesome. Also will have Fate/Stay Night characters to use in January.
